description: find direct (depth-1) edges connecting two PrimeKG nodes, e.g. drug-disease (read-only)
rules: read-only — never mutates the graph or any remote service
returns every direct edge between START_NODE_ID and END_NODE_ID, in either orientation, as a single-edge path
node ids are matched as strings
MAX_DEPTH >= 2 is accepted but depth-2 path expansion is a documented MVP stub in the core (no extra paths)
writes the connecting edges as JSON to record_store
usage: Set PRIMEKG_CSV (path to kg.csv), START_NODE_ID and END_NODE_ID (from search_nodes); optionally MAX_DEPTH. Output: find_paths.json.
limitation: Only direct (depth-1) connections are resolved; multi-hop paths are not yet implemented in the upstream core. Requires pandas and a local PrimeKG kg.csv edge list.
